## 🛡️ Pull Request Verification

Thank you for contributing to Project Claudia! To maintain our enterprise security standards, we require all logic-altering Pull Requests to undergo verification by the Claudia Engine itself.

### 📝 Description
- **Problem**: (What issue does this PR address?)
- **Solution**: (Summary of the changes made)
- **Impact**: (Which modules are affected?)

### ✅ Verification Gauntlet
- [ ] **Security Duel Log**: Link to your successful verification log.
  - *Required for: Core engine changes, agent prompt updates, or security bypass fixes.*
  - *Skip if: This PR only updates documentation, CSS, or non-functional assets.*
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Have you added/updated tests for this change?
- [ ] **AAIF Standards**: Does this change comply with the Agentic AI Foundation interoperability guidelines?

### 🚀 Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/ansonsaju/project-claudia/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
- [ ] My code follows the project's styling and governance model.

---
*Verified by Project Claudia Vanguard.*
